title: File & Vector Store Management

classes.name: Files
classes.notes: All methods are static. put() normalises string→Base64Document and UploadedFile→Base64Document before delegating. putFromPath delegates to put(Document::fromPath). putFromStorage delegates to put(Document::fromStorage).

classes.name: Stores
classes.notes: fake() also calls Files::fake() by default (bool $files=true). create() wraps $fileIds in Collection::make(). Returns Store instances.

classes.name: Store
classes.notes: add() normalises UploadedFile→Base64Document, then if StorableFile calls storeFile() (→Files::put). remove() optionally calls Files::delete(). refresh()/delete() delegate to $provider. Provider is an intersection type (FileProvider AND StoreProvider).

key_relationships: Files uses Ai (static facade calls: fakeableFileProvider, fakeFiles, assertFileUploaded, assertFileNotUploaded, assertNoFilesUploaded, assertFileDeleted, assertFileNotDeleted, assertNoFilesDeleted, filesAreFaked)

Stores uses Ai (static facade calls: fakeableStoreProvider, fakeStores, assertStoreCreated, assertStoreNotCreated, assertNoStoresCreated, assertStoreDeleted, assertStoreNotDeleted, assertNoStoresDeleted, storesAreFaked)
Stores creates Store (get() and create() return Store instances)
Store depends_on FileProvider&StoreProvider (constructor injection, intersection type)
Store uses Files (storeFile() calls Files::put(); remove() calls Files::delete(); fileAssertionCallback() calls Files::fakeId())
Store uses Ai (add() checks Ai::storesAreFaked(), calls Ai::recordFileAddition(); assert* methods call Ai::assertFileAddedToStore etc.)
Files uses Base64Document (normalisation of string/UploadedFile inputs)
Store uses Base64Document (UploadedFile normalisation in add())
Store uses ProviderDocument (wraps string fileId when calling provider.addFileToStore)
Store uses StoreFileCounts (readonly property, value object)
contracts_interfaces: StorableFile (Laravel\Ai\Contracts\Files\StorableFile) — accepted by Files::put() and Store::add()/storeFile()
HasProviderId (Laravel\Ai\Contracts\Files\HasProviderId) — returned by storeFile(), accepted by Store::add()/remove()
FileProvider (Laravel\Ai\Contracts\Providers\FileProvider) — part of Store's provider intersection type
StoreProvider (Laravel\Ai\Contracts\Providers\StoreProvider) — part of Store's provider intersection type
response_value_objects: StoredFileResponse — returned by Files::put() and implements HasProviderId
AddedDocumentResponse — returned by Store::add(), wraps provider response + fileId
StoreFileCounts — value object for file count stats in Store
file_type_classes: Base64Document (Laravel\Ai\Files\Base64Document) — StorableFile impl; static fromUpload(UploadedFile), as(string $name)
Document (Laravel\Ai\Files\Document) — StorableFile impl; static fromPath(string), fromStorage(string, ?string)
ProviderDocument (Laravel\Ai\Files\ProviderDocument) — HasProviderId impl; wraps a provider file ID string
